title: malus × adstringens
intro: Malus × adstringens is a hybrid plant derived from the Malus domestica species, commonly known as the crabapple. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Malus × adstringens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Malus × adstringens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
